title: leucanthemum flaveolum
intro: Leucanthemum flaveolum, also known as the yellow daisy or fall daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and feathery foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum flaveolum have been associated with various health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues, reduced fever, and alleviated respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
